changesProposed.name: Sequoia Capital

verified.name: Sequoia Capital
verified.thesis: Sequoia specializes in seed stage, early stage, and growth stage investments in private technology companies across clean tech, consumer internet, crypto, financial services, healthcare, mobile, and robotics sectors. The firm operates with an evergreen fund model allowing limited partners flexibility in liquidity.
verified.notes: In November 2025, Alfred Lin and Pat Grady became joint managing partners succeeding Roelof Botha. In August 2025, COO Sumaiya Balbale resigned following controversy over partner Shaun Maguire's statements. Firm separated into three independent entities: Sequoia (U.S./Europe), Peak XV Partners (India/Southeast Asia), and HongShan (China) from 2024.

changes.current: Sequoia specializes in seed stage, early stage, and growth stage investments in private technology companies across clean tech, consumer internet, crypto, financial services, healthcare, mobile, and robotics sectors. The firm operates with an evergreen fund model allowing limited partners flexibility rather than traditional 10-year fund cycles.
